In this episode of Votes and Verdicts, Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Government Analyst Andrew Silverman and PKF O’Connor Davies Tax P

summary: In a time of belt-tightening and America’s protein obsession, pork should be on a winning streak. It’s cheap compared with beef, which is climbing to record high prices, and it’s the type of clean protein consumers can’t seem to get enough of.

title: Gold Edges Up as Traders Weigh Mideast Conflict, Fed Rate Path
title_cn: 交易员权衡中东冲突和美联储利率走势，金价小幅上涨

title: Travelers Draws Wave of Bears as Stock Eyes Best Year Since 2000

title: Gold Miner Cadillac, Backers Raise C$385 Million in Canada IPO
title_cn: 金矿公司凯迪拉克及其支持者在加拿大 IPO 筹集 3.85 亿加元

title_cn: 7 月 24 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Brent crude retreated after hitting $100 a barrel amid concerns over the economic impact of high prices and renewed US trade tariffs, yet remained set for a substantial weekly increase as hostilities in the Middle East continue to threaten supplies.

title: Profits Are Beating a High Bar and Traders Still Aren’t Enthused
title_cn: 利润突破高位，交易员仍不热情

title: Metals Fluctuate as Middle East Escalation Keeps Bulls in Check

title: Oil Keeps Flowing From Red Sea as Hormuz Bypass Stays Open
title_cn: 霍尔木兹绕道保持开放，石油持续从红海流出
summary: Millions of barrels of Saudi Arabian crude are still being shipped from the nation’s Red Sea coast to the global market, despite threats and attacks by Yemen’s Houthi militants against the kingdom’s shipping that have the potential to further destabilize the global oil trade.

title: Nvidia, Microsoft Lead Call for Open-Weight AI Models After Kimi

summary: A coalition of technology companies led by Nvidia Corp. and Microsoft Corp. called on policymakers to promote the development of open-weight artificial intelligence models, positioning it as key to ensuring the US maintains technological leadership.

title_cn: Verizon 在无线和互联网收入方面实现扭亏为盈

title: AI Startup Midjourney Buys Astrology App Co-Star and is Building Its Own Apps

summary: Artificial intelligence lab Midjourney Inc. has bought the popular astrology app Co-Star and is building its first standalone image-generation app, the startup’s latest moves to push into new business areas after promising an ambitious expansion last month.

summary: Bain Capital and LY Corp. are considering making a fresh joint offer for Japanese online marketplace Kakaku.com Inc., people familiar with the matter said, marking an escalation in the bidding war with private equity firm EQT AB.

title: Vietnam Weighs Limiting Social Media Use for Children Under 16

summary: Vietnam may ban children under 16 years old from posting, commenting or reacting to posts on social media as the country looks to join other governments tightening online protections for minors.

title: Tech Stocks Face Investor Skepticism as Rally Stalls and Profit Estimates Rise
title_cn: 随着涨势停滞和盈利预期上升，科技股面临投资者的怀疑
summary: The earnings season is confirming worries that the technology rally had gone too far, with investors now harder to please and reluctant to buy into rising profit estimates.

title: Infosys Taps Veteran to Steer Software Leader Through AI Turmoil

title: US to Produce Ukraine’s Magura Sea Drones for the First Time

summary: A US manufacturer is set to produce Ukraine-designed, battle-tested boat drones for the first time, as the White House bids to bolster America’s military production and expand its unmanned arsenal.

title: US, Iran Exchange Strikes as Trump Mulls Wider Offensive

summary: The US and Iran exchanged limited strikes as the latest round of hostilities passed the two-week mark, after President Donald Trump warned of a potential “massive attack” to try and force through a peace deal.

title: Bolsonaro, Stepmom Reach Fragile Truce on Eve of Campaign Launch
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗与继母在竞选启动前夕达成脆弱休战协议
summary: Flávio Bolsonaro and his stepmother moved to squash a feud engulfing Brazil’s most powerful conservative family, striking a fragile truce as the the senator prepares to officially launch his presidential campaign on Saturday.

title: LA’s Homeless Population Rises Despite $1 Billion Annual Budget
title_cn: 尽管年度预算达 10 亿美元，洛杉矶无家可归人口仍在增加
summary: The homeless population in Los Angeles climbed for the first time in three years as Mayor Karen Bass slammed federal and state authorities for the setback.

title: Modi’s Rivals Launch New Offensive After Pellet Gun Allegations
title_cn: 莫迪的竞争对手在颗粒枪指控后发起新攻势
summary: India’s opposition parties opened another front against Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government Friday, demanding answers over allegations that the police used pellet guns against student protestors in New Delhi, a claim authorities have denied.

title: Trump to Meet Ukraine’s Zelenskyy Next Week in Bid to End War
title_cn: 特朗普将于下周会见乌克兰总统泽伦斯基以结束战争
summary: Ukrainian leader Volodymyr Zelenskyy is set to meet with President Donald Trump early next week, according to a White House official, amid efforts to revive diplomatic talks to end the war with Russia.

title: Trump Extends 10% Tariff Baseline in Broad Use of Trade Powers
title_cn: 特朗普扩大 10% 关税基准以广泛使用贸易权力
summary: The US extended a 10% tariff baseline hitting most major trading partners, prompting pushback from countries around the world while shoring up a protectionist wall that’s been a top priority for President Donald Trump despite its unpopularity at home.

title: India Moves Against Bitchat App Used in Nepal Gen Z Protests
title_cn: 印度对尼泊尔 Z 世代抗议中使用的 Bitchat 应用采取行动
summary: India has sought to restrict an encrypted peer-to-peer messaging app that gained prominence during Nepal’s 2025 Gen Z protests, according to the app’s co-founder, as New Delhi grapples with its own student protests.

title: Kast Replaces Chile Finance Official Juan Pablo Rodríguez on Positive Drug Test
title_cn: 卡斯特接替智利财政部长胡安·巴勃罗·罗德里格斯，因药检呈阳性
summary: Chile President José Antonio Kast accepted the resignation of Deputy Finance Minister Juan Pablo Rodríguez after a routine drug test returned an initial positive result.

title: Ken Griffin Backs Donalds in Florida Governor Race With $10 Million Donation
title_cn: 肯·格里芬捐赠 1000 万美元支持唐纳德参加佛罗里达州州长竞选
summary: Ken Griffin donated $10 million to a political action committee supporting Byron Donalds for governor of Florida, the largest single contribution recorded for the race.

title: China Probes Former CSRC Vice Chairman Over ‘Serious Violations’
title_cn: 中国调查前证监会副主席“严重违法”
summary: China is investigating Fang Xinghai, a former vice chairman of the China Securities Regulatory Commission, over suspected “serious violations of discipline and law” in the latest high-profile probe involving a former senior financial regulator.

title: After Palantir Beef, US Withdraws Bid to Improve Military Intel
title_cn: Palantir 牛肉之后，美国撤回了改善军事情报的投标
summary: A US government agency has withdrawn a bid to improve a military intelligence system that is at the heart of lethal targeting following a protest from Palantir Technologies Inc., according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Venezuela Earthquake Recovery: Trump Seeks to Unlock Frozen Assets for Aid
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震恢复：特朗普寻求解冻冻结资产进行援助
summary: The Trump administration and Venezuelan officials are exploring ways to unlock billions of dollars in frozen assets held abroad, looking to aid the South American nation’s recovery from twin earthquakes without placing more burden on US taxpayers, according to people familiar with the discussions.

title: Bangladesh’s President Resigns Citing Health Reasons
title_cn: 孟加拉国总统因健康原因辞职
summary: Bangladesh’s President Mohammed Shahabuddin, a long time ally of ousted Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina, resigned on health grounds, his spokesman said in a statement on Friday.

title: Thailand to Scrap $29.7 Billion Landbridge Project After Study
title_cn: 泰国研究后将取消297亿美元的陆桥项目
summary: Thailand plans to scrap its proposed landbridge megaproject that would link the Gulf of Thailand and the Andaman Sea after a government study found it was no longer economically viable and poses significant environmental risks.

title: Donald Trump’s New Tariffs Hit as Costs Roil Congressional Races
title_cn: 唐纳德·特朗普的新关税因成本扰乱国会竞选而受到打击
summary: The president leans in amid broad pushback to his trade policies.

title: Javier Milei Heads to Brazil to Back Flavio Bolsonaro Against Lula
title_cn: 哈维尔·米雷前往巴西支持弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗对抗卢拉

title: China Hits Back EU With Export Curbs on Rheinmetall, Others
title_cn: 中国对莱茵金属等公司实施出口限制以回击欧盟
summary: China slapped export controls on 14 European companies including German defense giant Rheinmetall AG, saying it acted in retaliation against the European Union’s sanctions on mainland and Hong Kong entities.

title: Ukraine’s Fedorov Snubs Zelenskyy Job Offers, Seeking Return

summary: Ukraine’s popular former Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov rejected all jobs offered to him by President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, saying he would only accept reinstatement to his old position, a move that could breathe new fire into nationwide protests backing him.

title: Indian Universities Warn Students Against Joining Exam Protests
title_cn: 印度大学警告学生不要参加考试抗议活动
summary: India’s two leading government-backed universities in Delhi have warned its students against joining the ongoing youth protests, prompting a backlash from political parties and alumni as demonstrations gather pace across the country.

title: Europe’s Summer Heat Waves Are Getting More Deadly
title_cn: 欧洲夏季热浪变得更加致命
summary: Soaring temperatures have shocked people across the continent, with sweltering conditions made worse by climate change.
